# blaze-motion

> A tuned motion engine and a set of composable, RSC-safe animation primitives for React + shadcn, curated on top of the motion.dev (`motion`) library ‚Äî a tuned core plus entrance, hover, stagger, and text/number effects. Installed the shadcn way ‚Äî the source files land in your repo, editable ‚Äî not as an opaque npm dependency. The whole engine's feel is retuned by editing one `feel` object.

## Install

- URL (works today, zero setup ‚Äî no components.json entry required): `npx shadcn add https://motion.asmitsah.dev/r/all.json`
- Single runtime dependency: `motion@^12.42.2`
- One command installs every file (lib/motion.ts + the provider + all primitives and effects) ‚Äî the single "all" registry item.

## The feel object (lib/motion.ts)

One block tunes the whole engine: `duration` (fast 0.2 / base 0.55 / slow 0.8), `ease` [0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1], `easeSoft` [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] (page transitions only), `rise` 28px, `inView` 0.3, `stagger` 0.08. Per-instance props still override.

## The core six primitives

- MotionProvider ‚Äî mounts once in the root layout; wraps children in LazyMotion (domAnimation, strict) + MotionConfig (reducedMotion="user"). Strict mode requires importing `m` from `motion/react-m`.
- FadeIn ‚Äî pure opacity fade for above-the-fold / on-mount content (no scroll trigger).
- Reveal ‚Äî scroll-triggered straight rise from below (opacity 0‚Üí1, y +28‚Üí0), once, at 30% in view. No spring, no scale.
- Stagger / StaggerItem ‚Äî two flat named exports (never a compound Stagger.Item, which is undefined across the RSC client-reference boundary and crashes next build's prerender). Container staggers children; item does the fadeUp rise.
- CinematicImage ‚Äî scale-down settle (opacity 0 / scale 1.1 ‚Üí opacity 1 / scale 1) for large images only; the wrapper must be overflow-hidden.
- PageTransition ‚Äî wraps route content in AnimatePresence (mode="wait"); fades + shifts on route change with easeSoft. Keyed via a `routeKey` prop, not `key`.

## Entrance / hover / stagger / text effects

- SpringPop ‚Äî scale-up overshoot spring (0.8 ‚Üí ~1.05 ‚Üí 1) + opacity on mount; the one deliberate overshoot, never on titles.
- BlurToFocus ‚Äî filter blur(10px) ‚Üí blur(0) + opacity on mount; GPU-costly filter, hero / single focal element only.
- LineDraw + LineDrawPath ‚Äî SVG line-draw; each path animates pathLength 0‚Üí1 then fades its fill in. Two flat exports; LineDraw IS the <svg>.
- AnimatedUnderline ‚Äî underline draws L‚ÜíR on hover, retracts out on leave; pure CSS, polymorphic via `as` (pass Link for internal nav).
- SiblingDimming + SiblingDimmingItem ‚Äî hover one grid card, siblings dim to 50% via :has(); no JS. Two flat exports.
- RadialStagger ‚Äî click a grid tile and a spring-pop ripples outward, each cell delayed by distance from the clicked origin.
- TextReveal ‚Äî per-word or per-char staggered straight rise (no scale); full string on aria-label for screen readers.
- NumberTicker ‚Äî count-up to a target on scroll-into-view, tabular-nums so width never jitters; reduced motion snaps to the value.
- ScrollProgressBar ‚Äî fixed, spring-smoothed bar whose scaleX tracks page (or a target element's) scroll; aria-hidden.
- Stagger's linear step is tunable via staggerChildren / delayChildren props (backward-compatible defaults 0.08 / 0.05).

## Design principles

- RSC-safe: every primitive is a 'use client' leaf (a few pure-CSS effects are Server Components); pages composed around them stay Server Components. Never a compound X.Item ‚Äî flat named exports only, or next build's prerender crashes.
- className / style passthrough on every primitive, so the primitive itself is the layout element.
- reducedMotion="user" is honored automatically ‚Äî motion-driven effects drop transforms to an opacity/instant state; CSS effects carry motion-reduce:transition-none.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/blaze-000/blaze-motion
- Site: https://motion.asmitsah.dev
- Foundation: https://motion.dev
